scripts.dev: cross-env PORT=3002 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3002 VITE_FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5173 concurrently "cross-env PORT=3002 npm --prefix backend run dev" "cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3002 VITE_FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5173 npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.backend: cross-env PORT=3002 npm --prefix backend run dev
scripts.frontend: cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3002 VITE_FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5173 npm --prefix frontend run dev
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "cross-env PORT=3002 npm --prefix backend run dev" "cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3002 VITE_FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5173 npm --prefix frontend run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build:frontend: cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3002 npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.release: npm run build:app && npm run build:final
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
